title: Truth Mirror
desc: TruthMirror will be an evidence-based claim verification system that checks news or user-submitted statements against credible sources and returns a clear verdict with citations, confidence, and reasoning. It supports supported/partially supported/contradicted/unsupported/unclear outcomes and abstains whenever evidence is insufficient

title: Argument Critic
desc: An AI that takes two opposing sides of a debate and rewrites each side into its strongest, fairest version before comparing them. It helps expose weak reasoning, hidden assumptions, and what each side is really trying to prove

title: AI Lie Tone
desc: An AI that analyzes text, voice, or chat tone for signs of evasion, manipulation, overconfidence, or emotional inconsistency. It does not claim absolute truth; it flags when something feels psychologically or logically off

title: Reflection AI
desc: An AI that studies your habits, choices, excuses, and repeated patterns to show you who you are becoming in practice, not just in words. It acts like a mirror for self-accountability, helping reveal blind spots, contradictions, and growth points.
